note: Merged release entry: pipeline-commands (0.2.0) + changelog-merged-entries (0.8.0) + board-actions-and-filter (0.9.0) + cli-cockpit-and-events (0.10.0 + the gogo CLI). Diagrams flattened from each member's report bundle (charts/ for the legacy-layout pipeline-commands) with slug-prefixed names; before/ carries each member's plan-time baseline (pairs by filename stem; pipeline-commands predates before-sets). Slim set — no diagrams.html; /gogo:view builds the page from source.

diagrams.title: pipeline-commands: Command pipeline — typed artifacts through validate-in/out, looping on issues
pipeline-commands: Issue lifecycle in the living issues.json
pipeline-commands: Validated review → implement hand-off via gogo-contracts
changelog-merged-entries: /gogo:done separate-vs-merged gate + one synthesis writer (1..N members)
changelog-merged-entries: merged-ship runtime — gates answered, entry synthesized, members flipped
board-actions-and-filter: board cockpit — action keys → intents → route → relaunch loop
board-actions-and-filter: board.py key → guard → intent state machine
cli-cockpit-and-events: gogo CLI cockpit — deterministic reader, Claude executor, events telemetry
cli-cockpit-and-events: a column move launches Claude — huh confirm → tmux → events.jsonl → fsnotify
